topStories.description: Creating a triangular contest in Sibsagar, BJP gives a ticket to former ULFA leader Kushal Dowari to take on the AGP’s Prodip Hazarika, as well as Raijor Dal president Akhil Gogoi, the incumbent MLA

topStories.title: What are Iran's demands for truce with US? Explained as Trump confirms talks with Tehran
topStories.description: Signals emerging from within Iran suggest that any move towards negotiations will come with steep and potentially non-negotiable demands.

topStories.title: After call with Trump, PM Modi discusses energy crisis with Sri Lanka President amid US-Iran war
topStories.description: Taking to X, PM Modi stated that his phone call with the Sri Lankan leader focused on the global energy crisis due to the West Asia conflict.

topStories.title: Only Hindu, Buddhist, Sikh can claim Scheduled Caste status: Supreme Court
topStories.description: Conversion to any other religion will lead to immediate, complete loss of Scheduled Caste status, regardless of birth, says Bench as it invokes Clause 3 of Constitution (Scheduled Castes) Order

topStories.title: Aid flotilla reaches Cuba amid US oil blockade and blackouts
topStories.description: An aid flotilla has arrived in Cuba as a US-imposed oil blockade drives severe fuel shortages and widespread blackouts.

topStories.title: MBS Pushing Trump To Press Ahead With Iran War, Sees 'Historic Opportunity': Report
topStories.description: Mohammed bin Salman is said to favour sustained pressure on Iran, even as Riyadh publicly backs diplomacy and officials warn of prolonged conflict risks.

topStories.title: US Supreme Court hears case on whether migrants stopped in Mexico can claim asylum in the US
topStories.description: At the centre of the case is whether migrants stopped on the Mexican side of the border can be considered to have “arrived” in the United States under federal law.

topStories.title: Democrats slam ICE for using excessive force to arrest woman at San Francisco Airport; 'illegal aliens', says DHS
topStories.description: California Democrats criticised ICE after a viral video showed a crying woman being detained at San Francisco airport. DHS said the two women arrested had final removal orders since 2019 and were in the US illegally, adding the action was unrelated to expanded airport enforcement plans.

topStories.title: Modi, Trump discuss West Asia conflict; India backs peace, secure Hormuz Strait
topStories.description: This was the first phone conversation between Modi and Trump since Israel and the US’s military strikes on Iran on Feb 28 triggered a conflict

topStories.title: Iran war shows norms of international conflicts have been upended
topStories.description: US threats against energy infrastructure, and Iran's retaliation on its Gulf neighbours, signal a clear change.

topStories.title: Taliban frees American researcher Dennis Coyle in ‘goodwill’ move after over a year in detention
topStories.description: Coyle, a linguist and researcher from Colorado, was arrested in January 2025. Taliban authorities said he violated local laws, without giving details.

topStories.title: US Aircraft Carrier That Left Mideast Over Fire Has Other Issues
topStories.description: The USS Gerald R. Ford aircraft carrier arrived at a port in Crete on Monday after it had to leave the Middle East — and the war against Iran — when a fire broke out in its laundry area. But the massive ship’s problems run a lot deeper than that.

dailyNews.title: Moment rescuers find man alive under the rubble in Tehran
dailyNews.description: Rescuers have pulled a man alive from the rubble after US-Israeli strikes hit a residential area in Tehran.

dailyNews.title: Ads are coming to Apple Maps, as Apple expands its business offerings
dailyNews.description: Apple Maps will launch ads this summer in the U.S. and Canada. Plus, a new suite of Apple Business offerings arrives April 14.

dailyNews.title: Who is Markwayne Mullin, Trump’s new homeland security chief?
dailyNews.description: Here's what we know about Markwayne Mullin, who'll oversee Trump’s contentious crackdown on migrants in the US.

dailyNews.title: Marco Rubio testifies in former congressman David Rivera's trial over alleged Venezuela lobbying
dailyNews.description: Prosecutors allege Rivera lobbied US officials in 2017 to ease pressure on Nicolas Maduro without disclosing he was paid $20 million by a subsidiary of Venezuela’s state oil company, violating the Foreign Agents Registration Act.

dailyNews.title: PM Modi, U.S. President Trump discuss West Asia crisis; focus on keeping Strait of Hormuz open for shipping
dailyNews.description: The call was initiated by the U.S. President, a day after he extended Washington's deadline by five days for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz

dailyNews.title: Keir Starmer’s policy on the Iran war is a recipe for catastrophe
dailyNews.description: The British government has learned no lessons from the disaster that the US-UK invasion of Iraq was.

dailyNews.title: QatarEnergy declares force majeure on some LNG contracts amid Iran war
dailyNews.description: The move comes amid production disruptions linked to the US-Israeli war on Iran, which have affected Qatar.

dailyNews.title: Is the US talking to Iran’s Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, and who is he?
dailyNews.description: Iranian leaders, including Ghalibaf, have denied that talks with the US are under way.

dailyNews.title: India “indispensable” for maintaining a free, open Indo-Pacific: Top US official
dailyNews.description: Colby is the second senior Trump administration official to visit India this month, after US deputy secretary of state Christopher Landau,

dailyNews.title: Rubio testifies in trial of ex-Florida congressman allegedly hired by Maduro government to lobby for Venezuela
dailyNews.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio is testifying on Tuesday in Miami, Florida, in the federal trial of former Miami congressman and roommate David Rivera.

dailyNews.title: Former Playboy model Kendra Wilkinson opts for GLP-1 shots instead of new jeans: 'Mama is on a budget'
dailyNews.description: Kendra Wilkinson says she plans to start GLP-1 weight loss shots after turning 40, noting her jeans feel tighter but insisting she is happy and at peace.

dailyNews.title: Oklahoma Gov Kevin Stitt announces who he's tapping to replace Markwayne Mullin in the US Senate
dailyNews.description: Republican Oklahoma Gov. Kevin Stitt announces Alan Armstrong as his choice to fill the U.S. Senate seat vacated by next DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin.

topStories.title: House conservatives erupt over Senate GOP, White House deal amid SAVE Act fight
topStories.description: Conservative House members are revolting against a Senate GOP deal to end the DHS shutdown, arguing that a budget reconciliation plan for ICE and voter ID is a political trap.

topStories.title: Ex-Trump counterterror chief Kent clashes with Levin, rejects Iran threat claims
topStories.description: Joe Kent claims Israel "forced President Trump into this war" in a heated Levin interview, denying leak allegations and disputing Iran intelligence.

topStories.title: Iran war grinds on amid conflicting messages from Trump and Tehran
topStories.description: Trump's optimism about talks to end the Iran war has been tempered by denials from Tehran, and violence that continues to keep the Strait of Hormuz gridlocked.

topStories.title: Rubio testifying in trial of ex-Rep. accused of illegal lobbying for Venezuela
topStories.description: Former Rep. David Rivera of Florida is accused of secretly lobbying for the Venezuelan government during the first Trump administration.

dailyNews.description: Joe Kent claims Israel "forced President Trump into this war" in a heated Levin interview, denying leak allegations and disputing Iran intelligence.

dailyNews.title: Iran war grinds on amid conflicting messages from Trump and Tehran
dailyNews.description: Trump's optimism about talks to end the Iran war has been tempered by denials from Tehran, and violence that continues to keep the Strait of Hormuz gridlocked.

dailyNews.title: Rubio testifying in trial of ex-Rep. accused of illegal lobbying for Venezuela
dailyNews.description: Former Rep. David Rivera of Florida is accused of secretly lobbying for the Venezuelan government during the first Trump administration.

dailyNews.title: Trump to host King Charles, Dutch royals in separate visits
dailyNews.description: In separate visits, President Trump is planning to host monarchs from the United Kingdom and the Netherlands next month.

dailyNews.title: Trump meets with Republican senators over DHS funding
dailyNews.description: President Trump met with Republican senators on Monday night to discuss Department of Homeland Security funding as the partial shutdown continues. Meanwhile, Mr. Trump also signaled he was open to a deal with Iran. CBS News' Taurean Small and Natalie Brand have the latest.

dailyNews.title: Trump voted by mail in Florida despite calling mail-in voting "cheating"
dailyNews.description: President Trump has long railed against mail-in voting, but used the method this month in a Florida election, public records indicate.

dailyNews.title: Iranian official says Tehran received "points from the U.S. through mediators"
dailyNews.description: An Iranian official told CBS News that Tehran received "points from the U.S. through mediators" after initially denying President Trump's claims that the U.S. and Iran were in talks. CBS News' Ed O'Keefe and Chris Livesay have more.

dailyNews.title: Saudi Leader Is Said to Push Trump to Continue Iran War in Recent Calls
dailyNews.description: Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman sees a “historic opportunity” to remake the region, according to people briefed by U.S. officials on the conversations.

dailyNews.title: Gregory Bovino’s Final Days: Harsh Words and Few Regrets
dailyNews.description: He was the face of the Trump administration’s immigration crackdown. But as he begins a retirement that was not entirely voluntary, the Border Patrol leader says he did not go far enough.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court Hears Trump Request to Block Asylum Seekers
dailyNews.description: A policy of turning back many asylum seekers at the border was rescinded in 2021, but the Justice Department wants the flexibility to reinstate it as a tool for border control.

dailyNews.title: Stephen Miller Asks Why Texas Pays to Teach Undocumented Children
dailyNews.description: Citing gridlock in Washington, President Trump’s top immigration adviser encouraged Texas lawmakers to lead on conservative priorities.

dailyNews.title: Thomas Massie Thinks Being Hated by Trump Is ‘Worth It.’ Will Voters Agree?
dailyNews.description: The Republican congressman from Kentucky is a die-hard libertarian who has centered his campaign on his willingness to buck the president. It has bought him the most expensive primary in the country.

dailyNews.title: Russian Oil Shipment Puts Focus on Kremlin Spy Outpost in Cuba
dailyNews.description: Moscow may be challenging President Trump’s effort to choke Cuba’s economy. China also has suspected listening posts on the island.

dailyNews.title: America's wealth gap is growing, and Trump's policies are making it bigger
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump has cut programs helping lower-income households while advancing policies benefiting the wealthy and corporations.

dailyNews.title: Iran Fires New Wave of Missiles Amid Trump’s Peace Talks Claims
dailyNews.description: While President Donald Trump talks of finding negotiated peace in the Middle East, Iran launched more missile attacks at Tel Aviv that damaged a residential neighborhood. The Iranian group firing those missiles, the Revolutionary Guard, dismissed Trump’s claim of diplomatic progress, saying, “contradictory behavior of the deceptive U.S. president does not distract us from the battlefield.” NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.
